subcodes.first_line: O thou who art near to the Most Glorious Beauty! That which thou didst write was perused. Praise be to God that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده مقرب جمال ابهی آنچه مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه گشت حمد کن خدا را که
subcodes.subjects: @the Bayan, its laws and their abrogation, @non-participation in politics, @business; financial; property matters
